posts.text:
BREAKING: The S&P 500 closes at its highest level on record, now up +13.6% since its March 30th bottom.

That marks a +$7.8 trillion run over the last 20 trading days for the S&P 500.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text:
$MOLY Today we announce a pre-approval for €50 million from the EIC Step Up program, which is part of Horizon Europe, the European Union key funding program. The terms of the transaction will be negotiated upon the final investment decision and will consider NPV parameters. The Company anticipates further announcements regarding equity financing 😎
#Greenland #Criticalminerals
